lines.text: Hello, I would like to schedule an appointment.
Certainly. What is the appointment regarding?
I need to speak with a doctor.
What day would work best for you?
lines.fullTranslation: Hangi gün sizin için en iyi olur?

lines.text: Are you available on Thursday morning?
Yes, that would be perfect.
We have an opening at 10:30.
Please book that time for me.
lines.fullTranslation: Lütfen o saati benim için ayırtın.

lines.text: I need to reschedule my appointment.
What was your original appointment time?
Friday at two o’clock.
Would next Monday work instead?
lines.fullTranslation: Onun yerine gelecek Pazartesi uygun olur mu?

lines.text: I would like to cancel my appointment.
May I ask for the reason?
Something urgent came up.
No problem. The appointment has been canceled.
Do you have any appointments available this afternoon?
lines.fullTranslation: Bugün öğleden sonra uygun randevularınız var mı?

lines.text: Yes, we have one slot at four o’clock.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, saat dörtte bir boşluğumuz var.

lines.text: That works for me.
Great, we will see you then.
How can I help you today?
I would like to make a dentist appointment.
Is it for a regular check-up?
No, I have a toothache.
I might be late for my appointment.
How late do you expect to be?
Around fifteen minutes.
That should still be okay.
Can I book the appointment online?
Yes, through our website.
Do I need to create an account?
Yes, registration is required.
I am calling to confirm your appointment tomorrow.
Yes, I will be there.
Please arrive ten minutes early.
Of course, thank you.
Would you like to arrange a meeting with the manager?
lines.fullTranslation: Müdür ile bir toplantı ayarlamak ister misiniz?

lines.text: Yes, preferably sometime next week.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, tercihen gelecek hafta bir zaman.

lines.text: Wednesday afternoon is currently available.
lines.fullTranslation: Çarşamba öğleden sonra şu anda uygun.

lines.text: That would suit me well.
I need to schedule an eye examination.
Have you visited us before?
lines.fullTranslation: Bizi daha önce ziyaret ettiniz mi?

lines.text: No, this would be my first visit.
lines.fullTranslation: Hayır, bu benim ilk ziyaretim olurdu.

lines.text: Then we will need some personal information first.
lines.fullTranslation: O zaman önce bazı kişisel bilgilere ihtiyacımız olacak.

lines.text: We would like to invite you for an interview.
lines.fullTranslation: Sizi bir görüşmeye davet etmek istiyoruz.

lines.text: Thank you. When would the interview take place?
lines.fullTranslation: Teşekkür ederim. Görüşme ne zaman gerçekleşecek?

lines.text: Next Tuesday at eleven in the morning.
lines.fullTranslation: Gelecek Salı sabah saat on birde.

lines.text: I am available at that time.
